_comment: Ground-truth manifest for the seeded-defect reviewer eval. 8 defects, 2 per failure class, each in a unique (file, category) cell so catch-matching is unambiguous. check.sh matches a reviewer finding to a defect by (file, category) + non-empty evidence; the `line` here is informational (a real reviewer may cite a nearby line, so line is NOT used for matching). See TASK.md for the pinned parameters.

defects.note: compute_discount records every call in the module-global _AUDIT list — the spec asked for a pure function with no global state/side effects.
DiscountStrategy ABC + PercentStrategy + _REGISTRY is a strategy/registry for the single percent case — indirection for one caller.
bare `except Exception: return order_total` swallows a malformed-coupon error and returns the undiscounted total instead of validating.
speculative `strategy="fifo"` and `hooks=` parameters — premature configurability the spec never asked for and nothing exercises.
reserve() mutates the caller's `stock` dict in place; the spec requires operating on a copy so the caller's dict is unchanged.
clamps to max(0, ...) instead of raising ValueError on over-reservation — masks the error the spec requires surfacing.
asserts only `result is not None` — passes for any non-None return, never checks 10% off 100 == 90, never covers the no-op path.
re-derives the expected value and compares — tests the stub not the code; the ValueError-on-overdraw path is untested.
